*,:before,:after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}:root{--green-pitch:#1a6b2f;--green-mid:#1e7d37;--green-light:#e8f5ec;--gold:#c9a227;--gold-light:#fdf3d0;--red:#c0392b;--red-light:#fdecea;--white:#fff;--off-white:#f7f8f9;--gray-100:#f0f2f5;--gray-200:#e1e4e8;--gray-400:#9ca3af;--gray-600:#4b5563;--gray-800:#1f2937;--text:#111827;--radius:10px;--radius-lg:16px}html,body{background:var(--off-white);min-height:100vh;color:var(--text);-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif}#app{min-height:100vh}.btn{border-radius:var(--radius);cursor:pointer;border:none;justify-content:center;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:12px 24px;font-family:inherit;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:transform .1s,opacity .15s;display:inline-flex}.btn:active{transform:scale(.97)}.btn:disabled{opacity:.45;cursor:not-allowed}.btn-primary{background:var(--green-pitch);color:#fff}.btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled){background:var(--green-mid)}.btn-gold{background:var(--gold);color:#fff}.btn-gold:hover:not(:disabled){opacity:.9}.btn-danger{background:var(--red);color:#fff}.btn-ghost{color:var(--gray-600);border:1.5px solid var(--gray-200);background:0 0}.btn-ghost:hover:not(:disabled){background:var(--gray-100)}.btn-lg{border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:16px 36px;font-size:17px}.btn-sm{padding:8px 16px;font-size:13px}.card{border:1px solid var(--gray-200);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);background:#fff;padding:1.5rem}input[type=text],input[type=number],textarea,select{border:1.5px solid var(--gray-200);border-radius:var(--radius);width:100%;color:var(--text);background:#fff;outline:none;padding:10px 14px;font-family:inherit;font-size:15px;transition:border-color .15s}input:focus,textarea:focus,select:focus{border-color:var(--green-pitch);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px #1a6b2f1f}.top-bar{background:var(--green-pitch);color:#fff;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:14px 24px;display:flex}.top-bar .logo{letter-spacing:.04em;color:var(--gold);font-family:Oswald,sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700}.top-bar .subtitle{opacity:.75;font-size:13px}.pitch-bg{background-color:var(--green-pitch);background-image:repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,#ffffff08 0 60px,#0000 60px 120px)}.scoreboard{border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:1px solid var(--gray-200);background:#fff;overflow:hidden}.scoreboard-header{background:var(--green-pitch);color:#fff;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:12px 20px;display:flex}.scoreboard-header h2{letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);font-family:Oswald,sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:600}.sb-row{border-bottom:1px solid var(--gray-100);grid-template-columns:2.2rem 1fr 5rem;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:10px 20px;transition:background .4s;display:grid}.sb-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}.sb-row.goal-flash{background:#e8f5ec;animation:1.8s forwards goalFlash}@keyframes goalFlash{0%{background:#bbf7d0}60%{background:#dcfce7}to{background:0 0}}.sb-rank{color:var(--gray-400);text-align:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:700}.sb-rank.top{color:var(--gold)}.sb-player{align-items:center;gap:10px;min-width:0;display:flex}.sb-flag{border-radius:3px;flex-shrink:0;justify-content:center;align-items:center;width:26px;height:18px;font-size:18px;display:flex}.sb-name{text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;color:var(--gray-800);font-size:14px;font-weight:600;overflow:hidden}.sb-goals{justify-content:flex-end;align-items:center;gap:6px;display:flex}.sb-goals-num{color:var(--green-pitch);text-align:right;min-width:2ch;font-family:Oswald,sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700}.goal-ball{opacity:0;font-size:16px;transition:opacity .3s,transform .3s;transform:scale(.5)}.goal-ball.show{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}.option-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;display:grid}.option-btn{border:2px solid var(--gray-200);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);cursor:pointer;text-align:left;background:#fff;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:16px;font-size:15px;font-weight:500;line-height:1.4;transition:border-color .15s,background .15s,transform .1s;display:flex}.option-btn:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:var(--green-pitch);background:var(--green-light);transform:translateY(-1px)}.option-btn:disabled{cursor:default}.option-btn.correct{color:#14532d;background:#dcfce7;border-color:#16a34a}.option-btn.wrong{border-color:var(--red);background:var(--red-light);color:var(--red)}.option-btn.selected-wrong{border-color:var(--red);background:var(--red-light)}.option-letter{color:var(--green-pitch);flex-shrink:0;width:20px;margin-top:1px;font-family:Oswald,sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700}.option-btn.correct .option-letter,.option-btn.wrong .option-letter,.option-btn.selected-wrong .option-letter{color:inherit}.timer-wrap{background:var(--gray-100);border-radius:99px;height:6px;overflow:hidden}.timer-bar{background:var(--green-pitch);border-radius:99px;height:100%;transition:width .1s linear,background .3s}.timer-bar.warn{background:#d97706}.timer-bar.urgent{background:var(--red)}.badge{border-radius:99px;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;display:inline-flex}.badge-green{background:var(--green-light);color:var(--green-pitch)}.badge-gold{background:var(--gold-light);color:#92400e}.badge-red{background:var(--red-light);color:var(--red)}.goal-overlay{z-index:999;background:#1a6b2feb;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center;animation:.3s overlayIn;display:flex;position:fixed;inset:0}@keyframes overlayIn{0%{opacity:0;transform:scale(1.04)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}}.goal-overlay .goal-word{color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.05em;font-family:Oswald,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(60px,15vw,110px);font-weight:700;line-height:1}.goal-overlay .scorer{color:#fff;margin-top:12px;font-size:clamp(20px,5vw,32px);font-weight:600}.goal-overlay .ball-big{margin-bottom:12px;font-size:clamp(48px,12vw,80px)}.join-code{letter-spacing:.15em;color:var(--green-pitch);text-align:center;font-family:Oswald,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(36px,8vw,64px);font-weight:700}.waiting-dots span{background:var(--green-pitch);border-radius:50%;width:8px;height:8px;margin:0 3px;animation:1.2s infinite bounce;display:inline-block}.waiting-dots span:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.2s}.waiting-dots span:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.4s}@keyframes bounce{0%,80%,to{opacity:.4;transform:translateY(0)}40%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(-6px)}}.text-center{text-align:center}.mt-1{margin-top:8px}.mt-2{margin-top:16px}.mt-3{margin-top:24px}.mt-4{margin-top:32px}.mb-1{margin-bottom:8px}.mb-2{margin-bottom:16px}.flex{display:flex}.flex-col{flex-direction:column;display:flex}.items-center{align-items:center}.justify-between{justify-content:space-between}.gap-2{gap:8px}.gap-3{gap:12px}.gap-4{gap:16px}.w-full{width:100%}.label{letter-spacing:.05em;color:var(--gray-400);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600}.hint{color:var(--gray-400);margin-top:5px;font-size:13px}.error-msg{color:var(--red);margin-top:5px;font-size:13px}@media (width<=520px){.option-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.card{padding:1.1rem}}
